$comment: Machine-readable contract source for the AutoFlow gate hook (issue #223). Single source of truth read by tests/test-issue-223-schema-hook-contract.sh to assert the hook's in-script literals/keys/paths equal these declared values. Values mirror .claude/hooks/check-autoflow-gate.sh EXACTLY; do not edit one without the other or the contract test fails (that is the drift signal).
$comment_closed_world: Issue #245 cycle-2 closed-world vocabulary. The hook validator (AUTOFLOW-SCHEMA-VALIDATION) accepts ONLY these top-level keys (or a fix_regression_cycle_N matching cycle_key_grammar), verdicts in verdict_enum (or empty/absent — gate-not-triggered, CLAUDE.md verdict rule), and scores in score_range; every other shape → MALFORMED → fail-closed. Mirror the hook EXACTLY (drift = contract-test failure).
